title: Roundtable disagreement-round response
description: One model seat's final opinion on the open disagreement points, after seeing every seat's position on each. One round only.

item_responses.description: One entry per open disagreement point (D1, D2, ...).

position.description: The seat's final position on this point after weighing the others.

agree.description: True if the seat now backs the emerging majority/consensus view on this point.

reasoning.description: Why the seat holds this position, on the merits.

confidence.description: The seat's confidence (0-100) in its final positions.
